title: GGUF rows>1 projection surfaces for Qwen3.5-0.8B Q4_K_M prefill

change.summary: Rows>1 GGUF linear dispatch now selects prefill variants for Q4_K pack8 and raw Q8_0/Q5_K/Q6_K. The kernels retain exact GGML quant math and use a measured-equivalent row-grid implementation rather than WMMA.
implemented: added FP16-output wrappers for Q4_K pack8/raw and raw Q8_0/Q5_K/Q6_K
registered pack8_prefill_* and prefill_* variants for rows > 1
updated launch_gguf_linear(...) to route rows > 1 to prefill variants without backend/quant model-dispatch branches
renamed row-grid device kernels to gguf_q4_k_pack8_prefill_out_kernel / gguf_k_prefill_out_kernel so profiler traces distinguish rows>1 prefill launches
added scripts/gguf_prefill_projection_smoke.py for CPU-reference rows>1 Q4_K pack8 + raw Q8_0/Q5_K/Q6_K smokes
caveats: This is a correctness/profiler diagnostic, not a promoted throughput row.
The implementation is a row-grid measured-equivalent prefill surface; WMMA/GEMM tiling remains a future optimization if profiling justifies it.

Public LLM.generate still uses token-serial full-model prefill until the linear-attention bulk scheduler path lands, but the native layer-level Qwen3.5 GGUF AOTriton prefill path now dispatches rows>1 projection variants.

rocprof_microbench.command: env HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-file gguf_task47_prefill_projection --output-directory /tmp/hipengine-gguf-task47-rocprof.FUj6VM -- python3 scripts/gguf_prefill_projection_smoke.py --rows 4 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build

qwen35_layer_prefill_profile.command: env HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-file gguf_task47_qwen_prefill --output-directory /tmp/hipengine-gguf-task47-qwen-rocprof.sUd4I7 -- python3 /tmp/profile_gguf_task47_qwen_prefill.py
qwen35_layer_prefill_profile.notes: Grid_Size_Y=4 for the Q4_K pack8 prefill projection launches, confirming the layer-level native Qwen3.5 GGUF prefill path no longer loops rows==1 GEMV for those projections.

validation.targeted_tests_command: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py tests/test_gguf_ops.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_full_attention_gpu.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_runner.py tests/test_llm_gguf_generate_path.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_tokenizer.py tests/test_gguf_e2e_acceptance.py tests/test_llm_generate.py tests/test_model_quant_and_imports.py tests/test_aotriton_discovery.py -q
